creator: glewis@eyesbeyond.com
text:
There is a minor problem with the latest patch.  PLIST_FILES needs to be
updated so it just has "clojure.jar" (since that is where it's now
installed) rather than clojure-1.4.0.jar.

I've made that change locally.

Maintainer (Peter), do you have any objection to this patch being
committed?

--
